name: tree-diagnostic-trainer
description: Fit-ит depth-limited DecisionTreeClassifier внутри sklearn Pipeline(ColumnTransformer, estimator), проверяет upstream linear baseline handoff, считает train-validation gap, экспортирует readable rules, node report, predictions, serialized spec и tree diagnostic report.
usage: python outputs/tree_diagnostic_trainer.py --spec ../data/tiny/problem_spec.json --preprocessing-contract ../data/tiny/preprocessing_contract.json --pipeline-spec ../data/tiny/pipeline_spec.json --column-transformer-spec ../data/tiny/column_transformer_spec.json --linear-baseline-spec ../data/tiny/linear_baseline_spec.json --tree-diagnostic-spec ../data/tiny/tree_diagnostic_spec.json --features ../data/tiny/ml_raw_features.csv --labels ../data/tiny/ml_labels.csv --manifest ../data/tiny/ml_split_manifest.csv --output outputs/tree_report.json --overfit-output outputs/tree_overfit_report.csv --node-output outputs/tree_node_report.csv --rules-output outputs/tree_rules.txt --predictions-output outputs/tree_predictions.csv --serialized-spec-output outputs/tree_serialized_spec.json
